---
title : "OLS Polynomials Rates"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: zephyr
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg; Pkg.activate(".."); Pkg.status()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Statistics, Random
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
colors = Makie.wong_colors()
blue, orange, red = colors[1], colors[2], colors[6]
```

```{julia}
seed = 1
Random.seed!(seed)
std_noise = 0.25

Xgrid = collect(-1:0.001:1)
ns = round.(Int, 10 .^ (1:0.25:5))
Ygrid = Xgrid .^ 2 .- 0.5
Ygrid_with_noise = Xgrid .^ 2 .- 0.5 .+ randn(length(Ygrid)) .* std_noise

nrep = 32
kmax = 5

train_error = zeros(nrep, length(ns))
insample_error = zeros(nrep, length(ns))
test_error = zeros(nrep, length(ns))

for irep in 1:nrep
    for in in 1:length(ns)
        n = ns[in]
        
        Xsample = rand(n) .* 2 .- 1
        Ysample = Xsample .^ 2 .- 0.5 .+ randn(n) .* std_noise
        
        Xdata = hcat([Xsample .^ i for i in 0:kmax]...)
        Xgriddata = hcat([Xgrid .^ i for i in 0:kmax]...)
        
        wdata = Xdata \ Ysample
        Ygrid_prediction = Xgriddata * wdata
        
        train_error[irep, in] = mean((Xdata * wdata .- Ysample) .^ 2)
        insample_error[irep, in] = mean((Xdata * wdata .- (Xsample .^ 2 .- 0.5)) .^ 2)
        test_error[irep, in] = std_noise^2 + mean((Ygrid_prediction .- Ygrid) .^ 2)
    end
end
```

```{julia}
mean_in = vec(mean(insample_error, dims=1))
std_in = vec(std(insample_error, dims=1))
mean_test = vec(mean(test_error, dims=1))
std_test = vec(std(test_error, dims=1))

x_log = log10.(ns)

fig = Figure(size=(800, 400))

# Fixed design (Subplot 1)
ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], 
           xlabel=L"\log_{10}(n)", 
           ylabel=L"\log_{10}(\text{excess risk})",
           title="Fixed design",
           titlefont=:regular,
           titlesize=16)

y1 = log10.(max.(mean_in, 1e-12))
lower_bound1 = log10.(max.(mean_in .- std_in, 1e-12))
upper_bound1 = log10.(mean_in .+ std_in)
lower_err1 = max.(0.0, y1 .- lower_bound1)
upper_err1 = max.(0.0, upper_bound1 .- y1)

errorbars!(ax1, x_log, y1, lower_err1, upper_err1, color=blue, linewidth=2)
lines!(ax1, x_log, y1, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="excess risk")

y_theory = log10.(std_noise^2 .* (kmax + 1) ./ ns)
lines!(ax1, x_log, y_theory, color=red, linewidth=2, label=L"\sigma^2 d / n")

axislegend(ax1, position=:rt)
limits!(ax1, 1, 5, -6, 4)

# Random design (Subplot 2)
ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2], 
           xlabel=L"\log_{10}(n)", 
           ylabel=L"\log_{10}(\text{excess risk})",
           title="Random design",
           titlefont=:regular,
           titlesize=16)

mean_excess_test = mean_test .- std_noise^2
y2 = log10.(max.(mean_excess_test, 1e-12))
lower_bound2 = log10.(max.(mean_test .- std_test .- std_noise^2, 1e-12))
upper_bound2 = log10.(max.(mean_test .+ std_test .- std_noise^2, 1e-12))
lower_err2 = max.(0.0, y2 .- lower_bound2)
upper_err2 = max.(0.0, upper_bound2 .- y2)

errorbars!(ax2, x_log, y2, lower_err2, upper_err2, color=blue, linewidth=2)
lines!(ax2, x_log, y2, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="excess risk")

lines!(ax2, x_log, y_theory, color=red, linewidth=2, label=L"\sigma^2 d / n")

axislegend(ax2, position=:rt)
limits!(ax2, 1, 5, -6, 4)

fig
```
